moods.label: Happy
moods.description: Bright, easygoing movies that lift the room.

moods.label: Romantic
moods.description: Warm, dreamy stories when you want heart first.

moods.label: Adventurous
moods.description: Big journeys, momentum, and cinematic escape.

moods.label: Thoughtful
moods.description: Smart, reflective movies that stay with you.

moods.label: Intense
moods.description: Sharp tension, adrenaline, and edge-of-seat energy.

moods.label: Nostalgic
moods.description: Comfort-watch picks with warmth and memory.

moods.label: Emotional
moods.description: Meaningful stories with a deeper emotional pull.

moods.label: Chill
moods.description: Relaxed late-night picks that feel cozy and easy.

movies.title: Interstellar
movies.tagline: Big ideas, huge emotion, and spectacle with depth.
movies.synopsis: A team travels through space in search of humanity's future, balancing mind-bending science with a deeply emotional core.

movies.title: Your Name
movies.tagline: A heartfelt, time-bending story that feels intimate and sweeping.
movies.synopsis: Two teenagers mysteriously swap lives and begin a search that turns into one of the most moving modern romance stories.

movies.title: Coco
movies.tagline: Colorful, musical, and genuinely moving in the best way.
movies.synopsis: A young musician journeys into the Land of the Dead and uncovers the story of his family with warmth, joy, and tears.

movies.title: Soul
movies.tagline: A warm, soulful reminder to enjoy being alive.
movies.synopsis: A musician on the edge of his breakthrough gets a cosmic detour that turns into a reflective and unexpectedly gentle story about life.

movies.title: Zindagi Na Milegi Dobara
movies.tagline: Friendship, travel, and a reminder to live a little louder.
movies.synopsis: Three friends head out on a road trip that slowly becomes a reset button for fear, friendship, and joy.

movies.title: Mad Max: Fury Road
movies.tagline: Pure velocity, world-class action, and relentless momentum.
movies.synopsis: A brutal chase across a desert wasteland turns into a masterclass in visual storytelling and adrenaline.

movies.title: Queen
movies.tagline: A solo trip becomes a joyful story of self-discovery.
movies.synopsis: After a sudden heartbreak, a young woman takes herself on the honeymoon she was meant to share and finds a whole new version of herself.

movies.title: About Time
movies.tagline: Love, family, and time travel with an incredibly soft heart.
movies.synopsis: A young man learns he can travel through time and slowly realizes the real magic is in ordinary days and the people he loves.

movies.title: Spider-Man: Into the Spider-Verse
movies.tagline: Stylish, electric, and full of momentum and heart.
movies.synopsis: Miles Morales steps into the multiverse and becomes the center of one of the most inventive and fun superhero stories around.

movies.title: La La Land
movies.tagline: A stylish love story full of color, music, and ache.
movies.synopsis: Two dreamers fall in love while chasing their ambitions, creating a movie that feels dazzling and bittersweet at the same time.

movies.title: The Martian
movies.tagline: A survival story powered by wit, grit, and optimism.
movies.synopsis: An astronaut stranded on Mars uses science, humor, and stubborn resilience to survive while the world figures out how to bring him home.

movies.title: 3 Idiots
movies.tagline: Funny, moving, and surprisingly sharp about life choices.
movies.synopsis: Three engineering students learn that success means a lot more than marks, status, or simply following the path everyone expects.

movies.title: The Grand Budapest Hotel
movies.tagline: Precise, playful, and beautifully odd in the best way.
movies.synopsis: A meticulous concierge and his lobby boy move through a whimsical old-world mystery full of style, comedy, and charm.

movies.title: Little Miss Sunshine
movies.tagline: Messy family chaos that somehow turns deeply comforting.
movies.synopsis: A wildly imperfect family piles into a van for a road trip that becomes funny, tender, and unexpectedly life-affirming.

movies.title: Whiplash
movies.tagline: Pressure, obsession, and rhythm pushed to the limit.
movies.synopsis: A driven drummer and a brutal instructor collide in a tense, blistering story about ambition, talent, and the cost of greatness.

movies.title: Jab We Met
movies.tagline: A runaway train of charm, comfort, and chemistry.
movies.synopsis: A chance journey throws together a free-spirited woman and a lost businessman in one of Hindi cinema's most rewatchable romances.

movies.title: Wake Up Sid
movies.tagline: A soft, city-lit comfort watch about growing up slowly.
movies.synopsis: A drifting college graduate learns how to take life seriously without losing the warmth and softness that make him who he is.

movies.title: The Secret Life of Walter Mitty
movies.tagline: A quiet life opens into a globe-spanning reset.
movies.synopsis: A daydreaming photo editor is pushed out of routine and into a real-world adventure that feels equal parts inspiring and comforting.

movies.title: The Intern
movies.tagline: Soft energy, easy humor, and quietly comforting chemistry.
movies.synopsis: A retired widower joins an online fashion company and ends up becoming the steady heart of the story.
